category_sources: source_facts.description: GNU File, Shell, and Text utilities; official GNU page describes GNU Core Utilities as basic file, shell, and text manipulation utilities
display_name_sources: Official GNU Coreutils page uses GNU Coreutils / GNU Core Utilities at https://www.gnu.org/software/coreutils/
docs_sources: Official GNU Coreutils manual at https://www.gnu.org/software/coreutils/manual/coreutils.html documents GNU core utilities
repo_sources: Official GNU Coreutils page says latest source with revision history can be browsed using cgit/gitweb and cloned from git.sv.gnu.org/coreutils
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GNU page identify file, shell, and text manipulation utilities; executable list includes many standard command-line utilities
